# ravy.pro

Personal website and blog of Andrei Rovnyi, software developer, game creator, and founder of XPLOIT Games.

## Main pages

- Home: https://ravy.pro/
- About Andrei Rovnyi: https://ravy.pro/about
- Blog: https://ravy.pro/blogs
- Categories: https://ravy.pro/categories

## Key topics

- Software development
- Game development
- Unity
- Tiny Boo: Homecoming
- AI music
- Zynthar
- Diva Rogue
- TabsBroadcast JavaScript library

## Important articles

- Tiny Boo: Homecoming roadmap: https://ravy.pro/blogs/roadmap-for-creating-tiny-boo-homecoming
- Tabs Broadcast JS Library: https://ravy.pro/blogs/tabs-broadcast
- AI music journey: https://ravy.pro/blogs/how-i-started-making-music-with-ai
